details.test: Task 1: Cloud migration quote request flow
Task 2: Choose cheaper managed IT plan with 24/7 support & security monitoring
Task 3: Save three cybersecurity blog posts for small businesses (last 12 months)
Task 4: Schedule 60-minute data analytics consultation with experienced consultant
Task 5: Build service bundle (>=3 services) under $10,000/month using calculator
Task 6: Healthcare case study inquiry with >=30% downtime reduction
Task 7: Newsletter subscription with Cloud & Cybersecurity topics (monthly)
Task 8: Shortlist service package under $3,000/month after comparing plans
Task 9: View remote work security checklist online and save to reading list
